mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_floor_drawing ORDER BY site, name
SELECT * FROM tb_floor_drawing WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY site, name
SELECT * FROM tb_floor_drawing WHERE site = #{site} AND active = 1 ORDER BY name
SELECT * FROM tb_floor_drawing WHERE work_place_id = #{workPlaceId} AND active = 1 ORDER BY name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_floor_drawing (work_place_id, name, site, floor, image_path, description, active, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{workPlaceId}, #{name}, #{site}, #{floor}, #{imagePath}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{active}, 1), GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_floor_drawing SET work_place_id = #{workPlaceId}, name = #{name}, site = #{site}, floor = #{floor}, image_path = #{imagePath}, description = #{description}, active = #{active}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_floor_drawing SET active = 0, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tb_floor_drawing SET name = CASE WHEN name = #{oldName} THEN #{newName} ELSE name END, site = CASE WHEN site = #{oldName} THEN #{newName} ELSE site END, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE name = #{oldName} OR site = #{oldName}
